response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and a history of open-source contributions and knowledge sharing, but lacks clear evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives required for this engineering productivity manager role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools and test infrastructure (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setups)
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical education (workshops, talks, frameworks)
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and systems programming with exposure to build systems and automation
concerns: No explicit evidence of people management or leading engineering teams beyond individual contributor roles
Lacks demonstrated experience in mobile platform ecosystems or large-scale build/testing infrastructure at scale
Resume emphasizes individual projects over organizational impact, roadmap planning, or cross-team alignment
